headline: Software Stocks Fall Again Amid Anthropic Enterprise Push. Trump Praises Palantir.
summary: Software stocks were hammered again on Friday amid growing investor fear that AI system builders OpenAI and Anthropic will undermine their core businesses.

headline: Why Workday (WDAY) Shares Are Getting Obliterated Today
summary: Shares of enterprise software company Workday (NASDAQ:WDAY) fell 6.5% in the afternoon session after Anthropic launched Managed Agents, autonomous AI systems that execute complex tasks.
